title: Satchels
description: Simple vanilla friendly mod that adds Satchels that can hold up to 3 items total.
body:
![Steve stealing a minecart full of satchels and a torch, fleeing a Cave Goober chasing them.](https://github.com/888Roses/Satchels/blob/master/assets/banner_title.png?raw=true)

# 🤔 What is Satchels? Satchels is a mod adding... satchels! A new item, cousin of the bundle, which can contain unstackable items. # 💡 Features ## 👜 Using Satchels Satchels can store up to 3 unstackable items. That is, for instance, a pickaxe, a shovel and a water bucket. Each slot can also store up to a forth of the stack size of any item. For example, 16 planks, or 4 eggs. Satchels are particularly handy in the end game, when a player may have multiple pickaxes, axes and shovels, which clutter the inventory; but also in the early game to store any enchantment book, alternate tool or even, minerals that you looted and gathered. Hover over the satchel in your inventory and scroll to select the item you wish to interact with. Right click to get it out of the satchel. Right click with an item on the satchel in your inventory to put it in the satchel. Right click with the satchel in your main hand to open a cute selection inventory, and right click again to get the selected item out of the satchel. ## 🛠️ Crafting Satchels Satchels can be crafted using **2 pieces of leather, 1 iron ingot and 1 string**: ![An image of the recipe for a satchel. Put one iron ingot on the top left of the recipe screen, a string on the top right, and two leather on the slots below the iron and the string to craft 1 satchel.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c873878e55645f6884dd02e52ca3ff40c3ba509.png) ## 🕸️ Decrepit Satchels Decrepit Satchels can be found in Mineshaft chests, containing miscellaneous caving materials, such as enchanted pickaxes, enchantment books, food, blocks & minerals: ![Screenshot of a Mineshaft chest containing a Satchel filled with an enchantment book, 2 pieces of bread and 5 pieces of raw gold.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a75c8abc7678adf978980214328ddeef482a8e.png) # ❓ Q&A
Can I use this in my modpack? Yes.
I have an issue. Where can I report it? Issues can be reported in the help channel of the Discord.
Can you port this to Forge/Neoforge/Quilt? No. I only make mods for Fabric and won't port them for other mod loaders. If you want to make a branch of Legion for another loader, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
Can you backport the mod to version `x.xx`? No. I make mods for the latest version of the game and will not backport them. Similarly to Question 1, if you want to make a branch of Satchels for another version of the game, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
